variables.name: VIBESEC_ENFORCEMENT
variables.security_effect: controls which unsuppressed findings violate policy

variables.name: VIBESEC_MIN_SEVERITY
variables.security_effect: sets the minimum severity eligible for enforcement

variables.name: VIBESEC_TOOL_DIR
variables.event_restriction: must come from trusted workflow configuration

variables.name: VIBESEC_NETWORK_MODE
variables.privacy_effect: online may send package metadata and file hashes; offline uses caller-provisioned data
variables.failure: unsupported or incomplete offline configuration exits 3

variables.name: VIBESEC_OSV_DATABASE_DIR
variables.failure: missing, malformed, or unsafe database exits 3

variables.name: VIBESEC_OSV_DATABASE_DATE
variables.security_effect: declares database freshness for fail-closed validation
variables.failure: missing, future, invalid, or stale date exits 3

variables.name: VIBESEC_IMAGE_REFERENCE
variables.event_restriction: disabled on pull_request and unknown GitHub events; trusted events only
variables.security_effect: enables scanning of an existing immutable image without building it
variables.privacy_effect: scanner may contact the named registry on a trusted event

variables.name: VIBESEC_DAST_IMAGE_REFERENCE
variables.security_effect: selects the prebuilt non-root application image; no build is permitted
variables.privacy_effect: Docker may contact the named registry
variables.failure: missing, tag-only, mutable, or root image exits 3

variables.name: VIBESEC_DAST_CONTAINER_PORT
variables.security_effect: selects the target container's internal HTTP port

variables.name: VIBESEC_DAST_BASE_PATH
accepted: absolute path without query, fragment, credentials, or traversal
variables.security_effect: bounds the passive baseline start path
variables.privacy_effect: sanitized path may appear in reports

variables.name: VIBESEC_DAST_MIN_SEVERITY
variables.security_effect: sets the minimum DAST severity eligible for enforcement
